title: I Won't Back Down
meaning_summary: Its resilient message and broad familiarity help the recording stay commercially durable across decades of replay.
revenue_drivers: Classic-rock playlists and motivational reuse support steady replay.
Cultural familiarity keeps the song relevant to newer listeners.
Sync and event-driven usage can lift annual earnings above baseline.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps the headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross track, label, publishing, and songwriter lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely controlled through the recording label or distributor unless a specific rights sale is known
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits affect the publishing share shown here
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No specific catalog sale adjustment is modeled for this track
ownership.notes: I Won't Back Down is modeled from public-facing catalog behavior and conservative rights-split assumptions, not from audited royalty statements.
